subject: Urgent: Your Account Has Been Suspended
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious activity on your account. Your account has been temporarily suspended for security purposes.

To restore access, please verify your identity immediately by clicking the link below:

http://bankk-verify.com/restore-account

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent account closure.

Sincerely,
Bank Security Team
label: phishing

subject: Password Expires Today - Immediate Action Required
body:
Hello,

Your company email password expires today. To avoid losing access to your account, please update your password immediately using the secure portal below:

http://company-helpdesk.net/password-reset

This is an automated message from IT Support.
Do not reply to this email.
label: phishing

body: ALERT: Your package could not be delivered. Confirm your address to reschedule: http://tracking-pkg.info/confirm?id=8847261
label: phishing

subject: Urgent Wire Transfer Needed
body:
Hi,

I need you to process an urgent wire transfer of $45,000 to a vendor. This is time-sensitive and confidential.

Please use the following account details:
Bank: First National
Account: 9283746510
Routing: 021000021

Confirm once done. Do not discuss this with anyone else.

Thanks,
John (CEO)
label: phishing

subject: Your Order #AMZ-9847231 Has Been Charged
body:
Your Amazon account has been charged $899.99 for Order #AMZ-9847231 (MacBook Pro 16").

If you did not make this purchase, click here to dispute and request a refund:
http://amazzon-orders.com/dispute

You must respond within 48 hours or the charge will be finalized.

Amazon Customer Service
label: phishing

subject: Unusual Sign-in Activity on Your Microsoft Account
body:
We detected a sign-in from an unrecognized device:

Location: Moscow, Russia
Device: Unknown Linux Device
Time: Today at 3:42 AM

If this wasn't you, secure your account immediately:
http://microsoft-verify.net/secure-account

Microsoft Account Security
label: phishing

body: HM Revenue: You are owed a tax refund of 847.50 GBP. Claim now before it expires: http://hmrc-refunds.co/claim/7742
label: phishing

subject: Document Shared With You: Q4_Financial_Report.xlsx
body:
A document has been shared with you via SharePoint.

Click below to view Q4_Financial_Report.xlsx:
http://sharepoint-docs.net/view/doc?id=38291

This link expires in 2 hours.

SharePoint Online
label: phishing

subject: Action Required: Update Your Direct Deposit Information
body:
Dear Employee,

Due to a system migration, all employees must re-enter their direct deposit information by end of day Friday.

Update your banking details here:
http://company-benefits.org/payroll-update

Failure to update will delay your next paycheck.

HR Department
label: phishing

subject: Payment Failed - Your Netflix Account Will Be Cancelled
body:
We were unable to process your payment for the current billing cycle.

To avoid account cancellation, please update your payment method within 24 hours:
http://netfllix-billing.com/update-payment

Netflix Support Team
label: phishing

subject: Your PayPal Account Has Been Limited
body:
We've limited your account due to suspicious activity.

Please log in to restore full access:
http://paypa1-alert.com/resolve

If not resolved in 72 hours, your account will be permanently restricted.

PayPal Security
label: phishing

body: Your bank card ending in 4921 has been blocked due to fraud. Call 0800-555-0123 immediately to unblock.
label: phishing
